title: Crunchy Mexican Corn Salad
description: A bright, savory, plant-based salad featuring roasted corn, fresh veggies, and a creamy coconut dressing with a touch of lime and spice.

ingredients.name: fresh corn kernels
ingredients.notes: or 2 ears boiled and cut into kernels

ingredients.name: jalapeño
ingredients.notes: finely sliced, seeds removed for milder heat

instructions: Spread the corn kernels on a baking sheet and roast for 8–10 minutes, or until lightly browned and crisp.
While the corn roasts, dice the bell pepper, cucumber, and red onion, slice the jalapeño, and chop the cilantro.
In a large bowl, combine the roasted corn, diced vegetables, sliced jalapeño, and cilantro.
Whisk together the lime juice, olive oil, coconut heavy cream, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat evenly.
Cover the bowl and let the salad rest at room temperature for about 10 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve chilled or at room temperature, and top with diced avocado if desired.
